_publications._publicationTitle: Exploiting mitochondrial and metabolic homeostasis as a vulnerability in NF1 deficient cells.

_contextSnippet: The IC 50 in nf1Δ yeast of Y100 was 4.46 μM, and the IC 50 of Y100B in nf1Δ yeast was 14.2 μM
details: IC50 in nf1Δ yeast was 4.46 μM, selectively inhibited growth/viability of nf1Δ yeast with minimal to no impact on NF1 wild-type yeast cells
